jobs.prompt:
## 任务：坯布文章发布 ### 类目：坯布（slug=tanhuo） ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下对应文件 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` ### 要求： 必须选类型1（规格解读型）：术语翻译+实际对比，让采购看懂规格书 - 具体规格参数代入：如133×72、40支等实际数据 - 独立写作风格，不套模板 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/坯布文章发布-06_37.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 40S/133×72, 60S/144×90, 45S/139×94, 32S/133×72, 50S/140×105, 21S/108×58, 16S/128×60, 30S/138×86 写作要求（严格遵守）： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 本次深度解读哪个具体坯布规格？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("坯布文章发布-06:37", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

## 任务：坯布文章发布 ### 类目：坯布（slug=tanhuo） ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下对应文件 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` ### 要求： 必须选类型6（产业带采购型）：产业带横向对比，实用采购参考 - 独立写作风格，不套模板 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/坯布文章发布-17_58.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 南通vs海宁, 广州中大vs绍兴柯桥, 佛山西樵vs石狮, 绍兴vs广州, 湖州vs南通, 南通vs石狮 写作要求（严格遵守）： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 本次对比哪两个产业带？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("坯布文章发布-17:58", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

## 任务：原料文章发布 ### 类目：原料（slug=tanjia） ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下对应文件 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` ### 要求： 必须选类型3（高端料平替与降本）：平替方案+成本对比数字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/原料文章发布-11_33.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 40S棉纱平替, 锦纶66平替锦纶6, 涤纶DTY平替, 进口纤维平替国产, 功能纤维平替 写作要求（严格遵守）： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 本次推荐哪种高端料平替方案？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("原料文章发布-11:33", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

## 任务：原料文章发布 ### 类目：原料（slug=tanjia） ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下对应文件 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` ### 要求： 必须选类型8（验货标准与物理指标揭秘）：具体指标+检测方法 - 独立写作风格，不套模板 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/原料文章发布-23_58.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 拉伸强力, 撕破强力, PH值, 甲醛含量, 色牢度评级, 缩水率测试 写作要求（严格遵守）： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 本次揭秘哪种物理指标的验货标准？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("原料文章发布-23:58", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

## 任务：辅料文章发布 ### 类目：辅料（slug=tanjia） ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下对应文件 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` ### 要求： 必须选类型5（产业分析）：产业带分布+供应商评估方法 - 独立写作风格，不套模板 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/辅料文章发布-16_15.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 义乌拉链, 嘉兴纽扣, 广州花边, 绍兴织带, 宁波衬布, 青岛纺衬 写作要求（严格遵守）： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 本次分析哪个产业带的哪种供应商分布？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("辅料文章发布-16:15", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

jobs.name: 纺织全域每日动态采集
jobs.prompt:
## 任务：纺织全域每日动态采集

### 执行时间
每天 10:00 自动执行

### 核心目标
从专业纺织网站采集当日行业动态，生成结构化摘要，供三类目（坯布/原料/辅料）联动写作。

### 采集来源
全球纺织网、慧聪网纺织频道、中国服装辅料网、锦桥纺织网、纺织服装商务网

### 输出文件
`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`

### 内容结构
```
## 原料动态（纱价/纤维/行情）
## 辅料动态（配件/包装/供需）
## 坯布动态（新品/织造/产能）
## 三品类联动热点
```

### 要求
- 采集完成后保存到output目录
- 只保存，不发布，不发到对话

## 任务：布行文章发布 ### 类目：布行（slug=tanhuo） ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cache/documents/doc_c6b4c1a1cb3b_布行.txt` 2. 当日trend文件：`/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`（含布行视角五大分析角度） ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/布行文章发布-08_42.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 南通vs海宁, 广州中大vs绍兴柯桥, 佛山西樵vs石狮, 绍兴vs南通, 湖州vs南通 本次对比哪两个产业带同款面料到货价？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 ### 写作要求（严格遵守）：： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None # 第一层：MiniMax #1 def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=_json.dumps(pl).encode(), headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = f'

' assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("布行文章发布-08:42", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

第一层：MiniMax #1 def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=_json.dumps(pl).encode(), headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = f'

' assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("布行文章发布-19:45", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

第一层：MiniMax #1 def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=_json.dumps(pl).encode(), headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = f'

' assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("服装文章发布-11:48", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。

`~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/探路-招商展会活动-上午.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 纺织展会, 招商加盟会, 行业论坛, 新品发布会, 产业峰会, 采购对接会 本次报道哪种活动并提炼对读者的价值？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 写作要求（严格遵守）： 1. 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 2. 禁止在正文中出现"引子："、"写作思路："、"本文结构："、"本节导语："等任何内部备注或引导词，正文必须直接开始叙述，不能有任何提示性前缀 3. 禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论），每次变换开头方式 4. 探钱库APP插入≤2次，场景触发，不硬广 5. 禁止引用其他平台 6. 无配图绝对不发布 ### 图片生成（必须执行，禁止跳过） 在 `execute_code` 中调用 `gen_img_and_build_html()` 生成图片并替换HTML中的[插图]： ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None try: def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqoqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=_json.dumps(pl).encode(), headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = f'

' assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker("探路-招商展会活动-上午", chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ``` 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 发布API POST https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw x-openclaw-secret: oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7 category字段传slug值本身（如tanjia/tanhuo/tandan/tanlu），禁止传中文标签。
